name: Baked Catfish & Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Make pecan sauce by combining 1/4 cup butter, chopped pecans, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl. Blend well.
2. In another bowl, combine flour, salt, red pepper, and lemon rind. Mix until well combined.
3. Roll each catfish fillet in the flour mixture, ensuring it is fully coated on all sides.
4. Melt 1/2 cup butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Brown the fillets in the skillet for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or until they are lightly browned. Turn them once to ensure even browning.
6. Transfer the fillets to a well-greased baking dish measuring 12x8x2 inches.
7. Sprinkle the pecan sauce over the fillets.
8. If desired, sprinkle additional chopped pecans on top.
9. Bake the dish uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
